unitPolicies.reason: The JSON-RPC/session API entrypoint depends on internal/api, which is outside the standalone compiler runtime port.
fmtMain is the commented formatter command path and depends on internal/format / language-service formatter settings, which are outside the standalone compiler runtime port.

runtimeAdaptation.reason: The stateful Go reader is stored as one JavaScript class instance while pointer values retain aggregate object identity.
The stateful Go writer is stored as one JavaScript class instance while pointer values retain aggregate object identity.
The public options alias is represented by the structural JavaScript option records consumed by this runtime.
The decoder struct is stored as one nominal class instance with private state while pointer values retain aggregate identity.
The encoder struct is stored as one nominal class instance with private state while pointer values retain aggregate identity.

runtimeAdaptation.nominalityReason: The unbranded string storage intentionally erases the distinct Go token-kind type identity.
runtimeAdaptation.reason: The JSON token kind is stored as its exact one-character JavaScript scalar representation.
The stateful JSON token value is stored as one JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.

basicStorage.reason: The exact xxh3 64-bit hash result requires lossless arithmetic beyond JavaScript Number precision.

runtimeAdaptation.reason: The external hasher struct is stored as one nominal class instance with exact fixed-width state and aggregate pointer identity.

basicStorage.reason: Each xxh3 128-bit result limb requires lossless 64-bit storage beyond JavaScript Number precision.

runtimeAdaptation.reason: The 128-bit result is stored as one nominal class containing two exact uint64 limbs with aggregate object identity.
The stateful error group is stored as one JavaScript class instance while pointer values retain aggregate identity.
The language tag is stored as a branded BCP-47 string and pointer writes replace the containing scalar slot.

runtimeAdaptation.nominalityReason: The public-only class shape intentionally erases the distinct Go condition-variable type identity.
runtimeAdaptation.reason: The condition variable stores mutable synchronization state in one JavaScript class instance while pointer values retain aggregate object identity.

The synchronization map stores mutable state in one JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity; Go interface keys are boxed by their statically selected comparable-key descriptor before entering the exact any/any Map surface, without runtime shape inference.

runtimeAdaptation.reason: The read-write mutex state is represented by one JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.
The wait-group state is represented by one JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.
The atomic boolean cell is stored as one mutable JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.
The atomic 32-bit integer cell is stored as one mutable JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.

The atomic unsigned 32-bit cell is stored as one mutable JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.

basicStorage.reason: The atomic uint64 cell requires exact lossless storage for all 64 bits and modulo arithmetic.

runtimeAdaptation.reason: The atomic unsigned 64-bit cell is stored as one mutable JavaScript class instance with aggregate object identity.

runtimeAdaptation.nominalityReason: The structural test-file interface intentionally erases the distinct Go map-file type identity.
runtimeAdaptation.reason: The in-memory test file is stored as one structural JavaScript record with aggregate object identity.

runtimeAdaptation.nominalityReason: The bigint scalar must participate directly in exact JavaScript arithmetic, which cannot preserve a distinct Go defined-type brand across operators.
runtimeAdaptation.reason: The duration defined type is stored as an exact signed 64-bit bigint scalar so nanosecond arithmetic never loses precision.
The time value is stored as one JavaScript class instance carrying exact wall, monotonic, and location state with aggregate identity.

runtimeAdaptation.nominalityReason: The structural range-table object intentionally erases the distinct Go range-table type identity.
runtimeAdaptation.reason: The Unicode range table is stored as one structural data object while pointers retain aggregate identity.

semanticRelations.reason: The host-native watcher stores this excluded Go declaration in the exact authored fswatch TypeScript module.
The host-native watcher stores this excluded Go declaration in the exact authored fswatch TypeScript module.
The host-native watcher stores this excluded Go declaration in the exact authored fswatch TypeScript module.
The host-native watcher stores this excluded Go declaration in the exact authored fswatch TypeScript module.
The host-native watcher stores this excluded Go declaration in the exact authored fswatch TypeScript module.

The exact signed 64-bit duration carrier has scalar zero and identity-copy semantics.
The time struct requires a fresh zero instance and field-wise value copy while retaining its location pointer.
The mutex zero value is unlocked and assignment produces independent synchronization state.
The read-write mutex zero value is unlocked and assignment produces independent synchronization state.
The once zero value is unexecuted and assignment copies the done state without sharing the outer value.
The synchronization map requires a fresh empty zero value and an independent field-wise assignment copy.
The wait-group zero value has a zero counter and assignment copies its state into an independent outer value.
The atomic boolean requires a fresh false cell for zero and an independent cell carrying the copied bit.
The atomic int32 requires a fresh zero cell and an independent cell carrying the exact wrapped copied value.
The atomic uint64 requires a fresh zero cell and an independent cell carrying the exact modulo-2^64 bigint value.
The xxh3 hasher zero and assignment operations copy all fixed-width accumulator and buffered byte fields exactly.
The 128-bit hash result requires a fresh zero pair and field-wise copying of both exact uint64 limbs.
The filesystem mode is an exact uint32 bitset with scalar zero and identity-copy semantics.
The reviewed language tag scalar maps the Go zero tag to Und and copies immutable tag storage by identity.
The string builder requires a fresh zero value and field-wise assignment copy preserving its address invariant and byte-slice header.
The JSON token kind uses an exact single-character scalar zero and immutable identity copy.
The JSON decoder requires a fresh zero struct and field-wise assignment copy preserving interface handles and slice backing storage.
The JSON encoder requires a fresh zero struct and field-wise assignment copy preserving its writer handle and slice-backed state.

Authored host-native facade for the upstream internal/fswatch package (out-of-scope OS file-watch internals: fanotify/FSEvents/kqueue/inotify). Exposes the public surface the execute watcher consumes with a stub that throws TSGO_EXTERNAL_FACADE_UNIMPLEMENTED; not a ported TS-Go unit, so it carries no @tsgo-unit metadata.

Static checker-specific Go map-key dictionaries preserve erased generic map semantics without runtime type inspection; their declarations are reviewed as explicit non-Go runtime-representation evidence.
Every source file must carry at least one @tsgo-unit unless an explicit policy allows it.
